owner_operator_stated: Dr. Eunice Park is described as the practice's owner/primary dentist
notes: Vendor hint domain ismilecare.com has an invalid/expired TLS certificate and could not be loaded (checked both https and http, both failed the same way). The practice's actual live website is a Google Sites page (sites.google.com/view/ismilecare), which corroborates the address (1600 W. Dempster, Suite LL1, Park Ridge, IL 60068) and phone (847-699-4000) exactly. No careers page found.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Kerry Lowery, D.D.S. is described as practice owner and lead dentist; the page also references a Dr. Oliva as a previous practice owner
notes: Address (650 N Northwest Hwy) and phone (847-292-2700) confirmed exact match on homepage. /careers and /meet-dr-lowery subpages returned 404 (URLs guessed, not linked from a confirmed nav). Site mentions a prior owner Dr. Oliva, but clearly states Dr. Lowery as current owner/operator.

owner_operator_stated: Co-founders/owners are Dr. Arlene M. Engert and Dr. Julie K. Davis, described as a mother-daughter duo
notes: Address (20 Main St) and phone (847-698-2161) match exactly. /meet-the-doctors/ and /careers/ subpages returned 404 (guessed URLs); no hiring info found on the homepage or contact page.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Paul DiFranco is owner; LinkedIn lists him as 'Owner - South Park Orthodontics,' matching the record's legal entity name South Park Ortho PLLC. The practice trades publicly as 'DiFranco Orthodontics.'
notes: Vendor hint domain (Petersonorthodontics.net) did not correspond to this record's address/phone and was NOT used. Address (401 W Talcott Rd) and phone (847-318-7711) confirmed exactly on difranco-ortho.com. The record's legal name 'South Park Ortho PLLC' is the same entity as 'DiFranco Orthodontics' (confirmed via LinkedIn: 'Paul DiFranco - Owner - South Park Orthodontics') -- a DBA/trade-name situation, not an ownership conflict. Site confirms this is a Smile Brands DSO-affiliated practice: footer/CMS domain is smilebrandscms.wpenginepowered.com and the careers link routes to careers.smilebrands.com, a national portal for 600+ affiliated dental practices. That portal did not show a Park Ridge-specific opening at time of check.

owner_operator_stated: Record names the entity 'May Christian DDS', but the corroborated site at this exact address/phone belongs to Rubino Dentistry, owned by Dr. Ross E. Rubino DDS FAGD (practicing in Park Ridge since 1978) with associate Dr. Lauren A. Rubino DMD (his daughter). No mention of a 'Christian May' or 'May Christian' anywhere on the corroborated site.
notes: Vendor hint Parkridgedentistry.com does NOT corroborate this record: that site's own contact page lists a different address (35 1/2 Prospect Avenue) and a different phone (847-692-7350), so it was rejected under the corroboration kill rule. Searching the phone "(847) 825-1002" in quotes located the actual occupant of 126 S Prospect Ave: Rubino Dentistry, run by the Rubino family since 1978, with no trace of 'May Christian'/'Christian May'. Classified as an ownership conflict per the successor rule -- the record's named entity appears stale/superseded.
